source: MÖRK BORG Bare Bones Edition + MBC class supplements

classes.name: Gutterborn Scum
classes.blurb: Razor blade and a moonless night, worth a week of honest work.
classes.ability: Small (Str 3d6-2). Stealthy: Pre/Agl tests at dr-2.
specialties: Coward's jab — surprise attacks +3 dmg on Agl dr10.
Filthy fingersmith — picks pockets/locks at Agl dr8. Comes with lockpicks.
Abominable gob lobber — spit d2/fight, Pre dr8; targets blinded d4 rounds.
Escaping fate — 50% chance an Omen is not spent.
Excretal stealth — hidden in filth, Pre dr16 to spot you.
Dodging death — 50% chance you survived any death you could plausibly survive.

classes.name: Fanged Deserter
classes.blurb: Thirty friends who never let you down: YOUR TEETH.
classes.ability: Built like a bull (Str 3d6+2). Not bright (Agl/Pre 3d6-1). Agl tests dr14 except defence. Illiterate.
specialties: Crumpled monster mask — goblins/gnoums/children must check Morale each round while you wear it.
Brown Scimitar of Galgenbeck — stinking d6 sword. 1/6 chance wound becomes fatal sepsis in 10 min.
Wizard Teeth — four teeth in a pouch. Pre-battle roll each as d6; every 6 = one max-damage attack.
Old Sigûrd's Sling — woven from grey hair. 2d4, rocks for ammo.
Ancient gore-hound — wheezing dog with a superb nose. Bite d6, 10hp, frenzies near goblins/berserkers.
Shoe of Death's Horse — d4 thrown, returns. 1/6 instantly kills small-medium creatures.

classes.name: Esoteric Hermit
classes.blurb: Silence and perfection. The chaos of a fallen world is irritating.
classes.ability: Wise (Pre 3d6+2). Weak (Str 3d6-2). Starts with one random scroll (sacred or unclean).
specialties: Master of fate — know the right way at Pre dr8. No maps required.
Book of Boiling Blood — once/day, enemy dr12 to interrupt; d2 berserker-slayers appear (4-in-6 friendly).
Speaker of truths — twice/day, lower an ally's next test dr by 4.
Initiate of the Invisible College — once/day, summon d2 single-use scrolls. Ash by sunrise.
Bard of the undying — your harp gives +d4 on reaction rolls.
Hawk as weapon — loyal hawk, claws/bite d4, 8hp, attacks/defends dr10.

classes.name: Wretched Royalty
classes.blurb: Bowed only by the memory of your own lost glory.
specialties: The Blade of Your Ancestors — talking d6+1 sword that quietly despises you. dr10.
Poltroon the Court Jester — irritating but capering. First 2 combat rounds, you and allies +2 atk/def.
Barbarister the Incredible Horse — magical, vain, smarter than you. +2 Pre on logic tests if persuaded.
Hamfund the Squire — guards Eurekia's scabbard. Once/combat, draw Eurekia (2d6). On 1, squire dies.
Snake-Skin Gift — sandalwood box, silk-wrapped dagger (d4). On 1, target dies of poison.
Horn of the Schleswig Lords — once/day, Pre dr12: one creature's next non-combat test auto-succeeds.

classes.name: Heretical Priest
classes.blurb: Hunted by the Two-Headed Basilisks. Desecrates cathedrals by night.
classes.ability: Insightful (Pre 3d6+2). Frail (Str 3d6-2). May use Powers in medium armor.
specialties: Sacred shepherd's crook — bone-hook staff, 2d4 vs faithful, ignored by the faithless.
Stolen mitre — Defence dr10 while worn. Stealth dr8 outside combat with ears down.
List of sins — Pre dr10 to mark the evil with strange light; +2 defence against them.
Blasphemous Nechrubel Bible — once/day, even: +d4 hp/rest; odd: GM invents d3 hallucinations.
Stones from Thel-emas — cast to reveal danger in next room. Pre dr10 to know if they lie.
666 — Wrong Jesus Crucifix — vs undead/lesser-trolls/goblins, Morale check ±Pre or they leave.

classes.name: Occult Herbmaster
classes.blurb: Born of the mushroom. Raised in the glade. Watched by the moon.
classes.ability: Tough as wood (Tou 3d6+2). Low in protein (Str 3d6-2). Portable Laboratory: daily, 2 random decoctions, d4 doses total.
specialties: Red poison — Tou dr12 or -d10 hp.
Ezumiel's vapor — dr14 or hallucinate d4 hours.
Southern Frog stew — vomit d4 hours; dr14 or do nothing else.
Elixir Vitalis — heals d6 hp, stops infection. Habit-forming.
Spider-Owl soup — dark-sight, climb walls for 30 min.
Fernor's philtre — drop in eye. Heals infection, +2 Pre for d4 hours.
Hyphos' enervating snuff — berserk one fight; 2 attacks/round, defence dr14.
Black poison — Tou dr14 or -d6 hp and blinded one hour.

classes.name: Pale One
classes.blurb: Fundamentally other, belonging nowhere, waiting for the inevitable.
classes.ability: Hollow bones (Tou 3d6-2), +1 Agl/Pre. Literate only in dead languages; cannot use scrolls. Knows one random Power, changing at dawn/dusk.
specialties: The Stars Were Right — d4+2 omens. Say something cryptic each spend.
Membranous Wings — short flight; no armor; birds dislike you.
Uncommon Clay — eat soil; normal food makes you ill; you smell of mushrooms.
Mana From Somewhere — spend a Powers use to create d6 servings of weird-delicious food.
Digitigrade Limbs — escape bindings, fit through small spaces, flexibility tests dr-4.
Too Many Eyes — never surprised. Leave an eye behind to spy; if squished, d2 damage.

classes.name: Cursed Skinwalker
classes.blurb: You should have died. Your soul mingled with another's in the dying.
classes.ability: Weakened mind (Pre 3d6-2). Bestial instincts (Str/Tou 3d6+1). Transformation: shift into your antithetical creature (1 round; armor/weapons unusable in form).
specialties: Murder-Plagued Rat — tiny (Agl dr8); bite d4 + disease.
Flayed and Dripping Wolf — fangs d6, crit on 19/20; blood-slick -d2 incoming damage.
Bone-Skulled Raven — flying (def dr10); 2 claw attacks/round (d4); bone scalp d6 + shield.
Bear from Bergen Chrypt — hulking; thick hide -d4; claws/bite d8.
Life-and-Death Lizard — regen d4 hp/round; bite d6 or acid spit d4; scales -d2.
Doomsaying Monkey — dextrous (Agl dr10); light gear works; third eye reads unclean scrolls dr10.

classes.name: Dead God's Prophet
classes.blurb: You hear voices. Or you think you do. Your god is dead.
classes.ability: Obsessed (Pre 3d6+2). Bodily-neglect weak (Tou 3d6-2). Literate; on encountering a scroll, Pre dr12 or destroy it as a false god's words. Starts with two random gifts.
specialties: Blood Tells — self-damage d3 pre-combat for +2 on rolls equal to hp lost.
Lord of Nothing — kingly garb. +2 to impress the easily fooled.
Smell of Decay — +2 defence (everyone gags).
Incoherent Sophistic Babble — listeners Pre dr10 or lose next action.
Ichor of Rot — attack dr12 to wipe black ichor on skin; Tou dr12 or spasm 2 turns.
My Body, A Vessel — once/day, ask GM one yes/no question, truthfully answered. You weaken.
In Death I Live — on death, Pre dr14: recover at 1 hp. Fail: holy flames.
Eyes of Holy Fire — once/combat, eye-beam dr10, d6 dmg; blind rest of fight.

classes.name: Forlorn Philosopher
classes.blurb: The dream of reason has decayed to shifting madness. Only the cold remains.
classes.ability: Mental Focus (Pre 3d6+2). Too Much Reading (Str 3d6-2). Ruthless Inquisition: Pre dr14 to tear through deceptions. Begins with one Tablet of Ochre Obscurity.
specialties: Thorns of Comprehension — pierce flesh (d2, escalating) for dr-4 and ignore two attacks.
Hegelian Owl — a bitter philosophical owl assistant.
Prism of Ambiguity — heal and reduce DRs; harm on failure.
Flute of Tosk — Echoing Fugue: an echo of fatal damage to another enemy.
Sash of the Stylite — no hunger, water-only hp recovery, collapse after d4 days.
Marked by Obscurity — ever-shifting Tablet tattooed on flesh.

classes.name: Sacrilegious Songbird
classes.blurb: Soul screaming, throat sweet. The deal of a lifetime.
classes.ability: Amplified personality (Pre 3d6+2). Hard life (Tou 3d6-2). Unnatural charm: spend a daily Powers use to add/subtract d6 from any Morale check.
specialties: Gut Pipes of Destiny — listeners filled with week-long unearthly hunger.
Hurty-Gurdy — Pre dr12 or take d2 escalating damage.
Spinal Husk drum — 2d6: 6+ all fall prone, 11 spine-break d4, 12 deafen self 24h. Doubles as shield.
Devil's Aquifer horn — Tou dr14 or fill lungs with seawater.
Mouth-to-Mouth Organ — broken listener heals d4 hp, mute until full health.
Lute of the Acute Brute — axe-lute (d8). Swaps listener Str/Pre for d6 days.
